scenario.name: sdp_488_response
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagA3202[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-A3202 Subject: 488 Response Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=34020000002000000001 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Play c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=video 6000 RTP/AVP 99 a=rtpmap:99 H266/90000 a=recvonly y=0000000202 f=v/6/1920x1080/25/1/4096a/1/4096/1

ACK sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagA3202[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
